input.command:
gh pr create --reviewer patflynn --title "feat(home): add native Antigravity IDE" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
Adds the native (autoPatchelf-based, like nixpkgs' VS Code) `pkgs.antigravity` package — explicitly **not** the FHS-wrapped `pkgs.antigravity-fhs` — to the home-manager config.

## Changes
- New option `cosmo.antigravity.enable` in `home/dev.nix`, type bool, **default false**, mirroring the existing `cosmo.gemini.enable` pattern. Installs the native Antigravity IDE when enabled.
- `pkgs.antigravity` is added to `home.packages` only when the option is true (`lib.optional`), matching how `gemini-cli` is gated.
- Enabled for classic-laddie's home profile (`cosmo.antigravity.enable = true`).

Default-false keeps it off the headless/WSL/Crostini/standalone-home-manager hosts where unfree isn't allowed and there's no GPU. Antigravity is unfree; `nixpkgs.config.allowUnfree = true` is already set for classic-laddie (`hosts/classic-laddie/hardware.nix`), so it builds there without any global allowUnfree change.

## Validation
- `nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.pkgs.antigravity.name` → `antigravity-1.23.2`
- `nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath` evaluates with no errors
- Confirmed the classic-laddie home profile includes `antigravity` in `home.packages` when enabled
- nixfmt / pre-commit hooks pass

Run: 20260614-2114-fa33cc67
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5

content.text:
Done. PR opened: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/568

## Summary

Added the **native** (autoPatchelf-based) `pkgs.antigravity` IDE — not the FHS variant — to the flake, gated behind a new option:

1. **`home/dev.nix`** — added `options.cosmo.antigravity.enable` (bool, default **false**), mirroring the `cosmo.gemini.enable` pattern, with a description noting it's the native non-FHS variant and unfree. The package is appended to `home.packages` via `lib.optional config.cosmo.antigravity.enable pkgs.antigravity`, matching how `gemini-cli` is gated. (It had been added unconditionally to the IDEs list — I removed that and replaced it with the gated form.)

2. **`flake.nix`** — set `cosmo.antigravity.enable = true` in classic-laddie's home-manager profile, alongside the existing per-host home settings.

Default-false keeps it off the headless/WSL/Crostini/standalone hosts where unfree isn't allowed.

**Validation:**
- `nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.classic-laddie.pkgs.antigravity.name` → `antigravity-1.23.2`
- `nix eval .#…config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath` evaluates cleanly
- Confirmed `antigravity` is in classic-laddie's `home.packages` when enabled
- nixfmt clean, pre-commit hooks passed, `klaus _pre-review` reported no issues

PR reviewer set to `patflynn`; no AI attribution in the commit or PR body.
